title: Epunk Durable Canvas Peg Bag with Floral Design - 33x30cm Hanging Laundry Organizer with Hook & Pockets for Washing Line Accessories (Colorful Patterns) (Flower A)
features: Material & Design: Crafted from heavy-duty canvas, this floral peg bag combines durability with vibrant aesthetics. The 33x30cm size offers ample space for 50+ pegs, while the printed patterns add a touch of style to your laundry routine. Ideal as washing line accessories for both indoor and outdoor use.

Functional Hook & Storage: Features a rust-resistant metal hook for instant hanging on washing lines or walls. The multi-pocket organiser keeps pegs tidy, and the foldable design allows compact storage when not in use. A must-have clothes peg bag for UK households.

Size & Portability: Measuring 33x30cm (13x12 inches), this large peg organiser holds more pegs than standard bags. The lightweight canvas (only 250g) and carry handle make it easy to move between garden and laundry room.

All-Weather Durability: Made of washable canvas, this outdoor peg storage resists fading and stains. The reinforced stitching ensures long-term use, perfect for British rainy days. Pair it with laundry accessories for a complete drying solution.
Stylish & Practical: Upgrade your laundry space with this stylish peg bag. The colorful floral design complements modern homes, while the dual-layer canvas prevents peg loss.
description: Specifications Material: Canvas Size: 33x30cm Color: Colored Quantity: 1 PCS Clothes Peg Bag Meet Your Laundry Sidekick Tired of pegs playing hide-and-seek in your garden? Our heavy-duty canvas peg bag is here to save the day! With a rust-proof metal hook that clings to washing lines like a loyal labrador, this 33x30cm laundry organiser can hold 60+ pegs – enough to survive even the Great British Washday Marathon. The vintage floral patterns add a dash of cheer to grey skies, making it the most stylish washing line accessory on your street. Built for British Weather Unlike flimsy plastic bags that surrender to drizzle, our weatherproof canvas peg bag laughs in the face of rain. The dual-layer fabric and reinforced stitching ensure your pegs stay dry and organised. Throw it in the garden during summer showers or hang it in the laundry room – either way, you’ll never utter “Where are the bloody pegs?!” again. Why UK Mums Love It “Finally, a clothes peg bag that doesn’t look like it belongs in Nana’s shed!”. The foldable design tucks neatly into drawers, while the multi-pocket organiser keeps pegs sorted by colour (because life’s too short for mismatched pegs). Plus, at 33x30cm, it’s large enough for bulk buyers but compact enough to avoid hubby’s “why do we need another bag?” eye-roll.
